topStories.title: Convicted spyware maker Bryan Fleming avoids jail at sentencing
topStories.description: The pcTattletale founder escapes a custodial sentence following the first successful prosecution of a spyware maker in the U.S. for over a decade.

topStories.title: The US could still try to play the ethnic card in Iran
topStories.description: But past experience and current geopolitical realities show such a strategy is doomed to failure.

topStories.title: Saudi Arabia hikes Arab Light crude to record premium for Asian refiners as US-Iran war continues
topStories.description: Saudi Arabia has raised the price of its Arab Light crude for Asian buyers to a record premium of $19.50, amid heightened tensions in the Middle East. This increase, though significant, was reportedly lower than analysts anticipated due to volatility in oil benchmarks.

dailyNews.title: Assam poll outcome hinges on parties reading the tea leaves right
dailyNews.description: Influential in at least 35 of the 126 seats in Assam, the ‘tea tribes’ have gravitated towards the BJP since 2014; the Congress is counting on the State government’s ‘failure’ to increase wages and provide ST reservation to the community

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day: Michael Korda's take on discipline and goals – ‘One way to keep momentum going is to have…’
dailyNews.description: Michael Korda reminds us that momentum is fragile and must be sustained through ever-evolving goals. Achievement isn’t the end but a stepping stone; without new challenges, motivation fades. Continuous ambition keeps progress alive and prevents stagnation.

dailyNews.title: Steve Bannon case: Supreme Court clears legal path for dismissal of charges linked to Capitol riot investigation
dailyNews.description: Both federal prosecutors and Bannon requested that the Supreme Court vacate a lower appeals court ruling that had upheld his conviction. They also asked that the case be sent back to a trial court with instructions to dismiss the original charges.

dailyNews.title: ‘Not getting answers’: SC on ‘unreliable’ forensic report in Biren Singh row
dailyNews.description: “As per this report, even the Doordarshan recording is tampered with. Should we then ask him to come and record his voice?” the Supreme Court asked

dailyNews.title: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Nasdaq Tick Higher Amid Iran Truce Expectations
dailyNews.description: S&P 500 opened 0.17% or 11 points higher at 6,593.77.

dailyNews.title: Assembly elections LIVE: Congress keeps singing to Pakistan's tunes, compromising nation’s security, says PM Modi
dailyNews.description: On the development front, Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the Congress had always taken a myopic view on the matter, while the BJP works towards ensuring long-term development of the nation

dailyNews.title: Who is Steve Hilton? Trump-endorsed Republican aiming to replace Gavin Newsom in 2026 governor election
dailyNews.description: Steve Hilton’s career spans British politics, Silicon Valley innovation, and American media. With a blend of policy experience, media visibility, and now a high-profile endorsement from Donald Trump, he has emerged as a key Republican figure in California’s 2026 gubernatorial race.

dailyNews.title: Ahead of Donald Trump’s Iran war briefing, Tehran rejects US 15-point plan as ‘illogical,’ hardens stance
dailyNews.description: While delivering Iranian stance on the 15-point plan, Iran foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei also said that any negotiations cannot take place under threats.

dailyNews.title: How US operation to rescue air officer from Iran unfolded
dailyNews.description: President Trump says US service member whose fighter jet was shot down over Iran is rescued during two raids.

dailyNews.title: Iran claims US airman rescue may have been cover to ‘steal enriched uranium’
dailyNews.description: Amid the ongoing Middle East conflict, Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei alleged that the US's plan to rescue its downed airman could have been a cover to steal the country's enriched uranium.

dailyNews.title: US Stock Market Today | Dow Jones | Nasdaq Live: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures edge up as investors weigh Iran war developments
dailyNews.description: Dow Jones Today | Nasdaq | S&P 500 | US Stock Market Live Updates: At 7:13 a.m. ET, Dow E-minis were down 62 points, or 0.13%, S&P 500 E-minis were up 4.5 points, or 0.07%, and Nasdaq 100 E-minis were up 75 points, or 0.31%. Prolonged closure of the Strait of ‌Hormuz, an essential chokepoint in global oil trade, has weighed on energy prices and has reinforced inflation fears.

dailyNews.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
dailyNews.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

dailyNews.title: Has Trump confirmed Iran’s claim that protesters were US-armed?
dailyNews.description: US president says Washington armed Kurdish Iranian opposition groups during the January demonstrations.

dailyNews.title: White House declares ‘press lid’ sparking speculation over Trump's health; here is what we know
dailyNews.description: Trump's health issues include high cholesterol and Chronic Venous Insufficiency, confirmed by his physician. The White House has denied rumours of a medical emergency, stating he is fit for duty.

dailyNews.title: DR Congo agrees to take deportees from the US
dailyNews.description: The country will start receiving deportees from this month but has not said how many they will accept.

dailyNews.title: Young gray whale dies after swimming up river in Washington state
dailyNews.description: Hunger is a likely reason the whale, dubbed Willapa Willy, travelled inland, experts say.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan offers two-stage truce plan to end US-Israel war: Report
dailyNews.description: Iran, while still reviewing the proposal, has said that it won't reopen Hormuz as part of a temporary ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s ‘Bridge Day’ threat: Can a last-ditch ceasefire plan work?
dailyNews.description: Mediators Pakistan, Turkiye and Egypt are proposing a 45-day ceasefire plan. But Iran is reluctant.

dailyNews.title: Pro wrestling star Trevor Lee signs MLW deal, talks goals with company
dailyNews.description: Pro wrestling star Trevor Lee signs with MLW and will continue as the Southern Crown champion after his release from WWE as Cameron Grimes years ago.

dailyNews.title: Chelsea Handler rips marriage as ‘outdated,’ says she prioritizes freedom
dailyNews.description: Comedian Chelsea Handler shares her views on dating, freedom and why she's "not out seeking men" during a candid podcast interview about relationships.

topStories.title: WNBA champ Natasha Cloud takes issue with Trump's Iran message on Easter
topStories.description: New York Liberty guard Natasha Cloud slammed President Donald Trump for his Easter Sunday warning to Iran, saying a president threatening to bomb "is not a man of Christ."

topStories.title: Harvard alum praises Trump admin targeting university admissions policies, handling of antisemitism
topStories.description: Harvard graduate praises the Trump admin for launching new federal probes alleging antisemitism failures and illegal race-based admissions preferences.

topStories.title: President Trump makes endorsement in California gubernatorial race: 'He will be a GREAT Governor'
topStories.description: President Donald Trump endorsed California gubernatorial candidate Steve Hilton ahead of the upcoming June primary in the Golden State.

topStories.title: On Iran, Trump Keeps World Off Balance With Ever-Changing Threats
topStories.description: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.

topStories.title: Trump’s Lesson From Risky Rescue: Threaten to Go Harder at Iran
topStories.description: In an expletive-laced social media post, the president said Iran should open the Strait of Hormuz or he would bomb bridges and power plants.

dailyNews.description: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.

dailyNews.description: In an expletive-laced social media post, the president said Iran should open the Strait of Hormuz or he would bomb bridges and power plants.

dailyNews.title: Plunging International Student Enrollment Under Trump Squeezes Colleges
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration’s campaign to curtail international students is not just hitting the elite schools targeted by the government.

dailyNews.title: Forget the A.I. Apocalypse. Memes Have Already Nuked Our Culture.
dailyNews.description: From our jokes and slang to the White House’s policy messaging, internet “brain rot” has escaped our phones to take over … well, everything.

dailyNews.title: Trump's profanity-laced ultimatum to Iran looms over new bid for truce
dailyNews.description: Trump's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges if it doesn't make a deal to end the war by Tuesday is looming over a Pakistani ceasefire push.

dailyNews.title: Republicans, Democrats react to Trump's Iran war as bipartisan backlash rises
dailyNews.description: Political strategist Joel Payne and Rina Shah join CBS News with more insight on reactions to President Trump's Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran will be "living in Hell" as he threatens bridges, electrical plants
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on social media a profanity-laced threat to Iran over the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Nancy Cordes and Elizabeth Palmer report.

dailyNews.title: Expert weighs in on rescue missions for downed U.S. fighter jet, Trump's threats against Iran
dailyNews.description: Aaron MacLean, a retired U.S. Marine and CBS News national security analyst, joins "CBS Mornings" to discuss the rescue missions for crew members after Iran downed a U.S. fighter jet on Friday and President Trump's threats against Iran over the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump makes explicit threat to Iran over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted an explicit, threatening message to Iran on social media on Sunday over the Strait of Hormuz. Meanwhile, Mr. Trump is set to hold a briefing Monday afternoon on the successful search-and-rescue mission for a missing crew member after Iran downed F15-E fighter jet. Nancy Cordes has more.

dailyNews.title: Latest news on Iran war as Trump ratchets up threats over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump is expected to address the rescue of two U.S. airmen after their F-15E fighter jet was downed over Iran. This comes as Mr. Trump's threats over the Strait of Hormuz get heated. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Ramy Inocencio report.

dailyNews.title: Trump's Iran ultimatum and signals of a possible deal keep investors on tenterhooks
dailyNews.description: Investors head into what could be the most consequential week of the Iran conflict, scrambling to position for binary outcomes: an imminent deal or further escalation.

dailyNews.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
dailyNews.description: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.
